description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a robust wooden exterior frame and a blue water-filled interior. The jacuzzi features a set of metal handrails and a detachable wooden ladder for easy access, as well as an external filtration or pump unit attached to one side. The water inside is clear and appears to be nearly full, with the surface reflecting the sky. The wood paneling is reinforced with vertical supports, giving the structure a sturdy and premium appearance. The overall design is practical for outdoor urban environments, such as backyards or communal spaces, and the jacuzzi is large enough to accommodate several people comfortably.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with blue water, metal handrails, a wooden ladder, and an external pump unit.
description_view_0: The jacuzzi is seen from an angle showing the metal handrails, the external pump unit, and the clear blue water surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the long side of the jacuzzi, showing the wooden paneling and the metal handrails at the far end.
description_view_2: The front of the jacuzzi is visible, featuring the wooden ladder and metal handrails for entry.
description_view_3: A side view showing both the wooden ladder and the external pump unit, with the water surface clearly visible.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water surface close to the top edge
